title: Add developer sitemap / site navigation reference

requirements.text: Create a dedicated '/sitemap' route (or modal/drawer accessible from the footer or navbar) that renders a visual, human-readable sitemap listing all page sections: Home, Products, Offers, About, Why Choose Us, Reviews, and Contact — each as a clickable anchor that smooth-scrolls to the corresponding section.

quotes: Add sitemap for my process easier

acceptanceCriteria: All seven sections (Home, Products, Offers, About, Why Choose Us, Reviews, Contact) are listed in the sitemap view.
Each entry is a clickable link that navigates/scrolls to the corresponding section on the main page.
The sitemap view is accessible from the footer navigation links.
The sitemap renders correctly on both desktop and mobile viewports.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
The existing frontend/public/sitemap.xml and frontend/public/robots.txt must remain unchanged.
The sitemap link tag already present in frontend/index.html must not be removed.
nonGoals: Modifying the backend or any Motoko code.
Regenerating or replacing the existing XML sitemap (frontend/public/sitemap.xml).
Adding new pages or sections beyond those already in the app.
Any SEO changes beyond what is needed for the visual sitemap page.
